title: senecio toroanus
intro: Senecio toroanus, also known as Blue Mountain Ragwort or Blue Mountain Groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. Traditionally, Senecio toroanus has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, with potential uses in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Senecio toroanus include reducing inflammation and promoting the healing of wounds, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial properties. Senecio toroanus can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal preparations.
